extension.summary: Kodiman's Wasteland – Endzeit-Skin für Kodi Omega
Kodiman's Wasteland – Post-apocalyptic skin for Kodi Omega
extension.description: Ein postapokalyptischer Wasteland-Skin für Kodi Omega. Rostbraune Akzente, aschegraue Paneele und eine raue industrielle Ästhetik. Inspiriert von Kodiman's Wasteland.
A post-apocalyptic wasteland skin for Kodi Omega. Rust-brown accents, ash-grey panels, and a rough industrial aesthetic. Inspired by Kodiman's Wasteland.
